scripts.build: concurrently -n core,renderer,server,web -c blue,green,magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @owndesign/core build" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/renderer build" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/server build" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/web build" && pnpm --filter @owndesign/desktop build && pnpm --filter owndesign build
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n core,renderer,server,web,desktop,cli -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "pnpm --filter @owndesign/core typecheck" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/renderer typecheck" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/server typecheck" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/web typecheck" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/desktop typecheck" "pnpm --filter owndesign typecheck"
scripts.test: concurrently -n core,renderer,server,web,desktop,cli -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "pnpm --filter @owndesign/core test" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/renderer test" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/server test" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/web test" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/desktop test" "pnpm --filter owndesign test"
scripts.test:watch: concurrently -k -n core,renderer,server,web,desktop,cli -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red "pnpm --filter @owndesign/core test:watch" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/renderer test:watch" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/server test:watch" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/web test:watch" "pnpm --filter @owndesign/desktop test:watch" "pnpm --filter owndesign test:watch"
